description: 12-slide DALP deck using only blank slides with recipe layouts to showcase the enhanced canvas system

slides.title: DALP: Digital Asset Lifecycle Platform
slides.subtitle: Complete infrastructure for tokenized assets on EVM chains | April 2026

slides.title: DALP Architecture
slides.layer1_body: Asset Designer, Compliance Dashboard, Monitoring Console, Identity Manager, Portfolio Views
slides.layer2_body: Token Lifecycle Engine, Compliance Rule Engine, OnchainID Verification, Event Streaming, RBAC
slides.layer3_body: REST APIs, Custody Connectors (ISMARTCustodian), Collateral Management, XVP Settlement Engine
slides.layer4_body: ERC-3643 permissioned tokens, 13 SMART extensions, Modular Compliance Modules, On-chain Claims
slides.layer5_body: Hyperledger Besu, Ethereum, Polygon, Avalanche, any EVM-compatible chain

slides.title: Asset Lifecycle in Four Stages
slides.step1_body: Select asset type and define compliance rules, eligibility criteria, and token parameters
slides.step2_body: Deploy token contracts, compliance modules, and identity registry to your EVM network
slides.step3_body: Onboard investors via OnchainID, execute issuance, and enforce transfer restrictions
slides.step4_body: Add asset classes, connect custodians, enable XVP settlement, expand to new networks

slides.title: DALP by the Numbers
slides.stat1_body: Bonds, deposits, stablecoins, equity, funds, real estate, precious metals
slides.stat2_body: Composable modules: custody, collateral, yield, governance, pausable, and more
slides.stat3_body: XVP settlement, token sale, vesting airdrop, fixed yield schedule, vault

slides.title: Traditional vs DALP
slides.left_body:
Manual compliance checks taking days per investor

12-18 month custom blockchain builds

Siloed registrar, transfer agent, custodian

Manual dividend and coupon calculations

Fragmented audit trails across databases

Post-transaction compliance monitoring
slides.right_body:
Automated on-chain compliance before every transfer

Weeks from configuration to live token

Single platform for full asset lifecycle

Automated corporate action processing

Immutable on-chain audit trail

Pre-transaction validation via ERC-3643

slides.title: Core Capabilities
slides.item1_body: ERC-3643 modules validate investor eligibility, jurisdiction rules, and holding limits at the contract level before execution.
slides.item2_body: OnchainID provides cryptographic attestation for KYC, AML, and investor classification with reusable claims.
slides.item3_body: ISMARTCustodian handles forced transfers, freeze/unfreeze, and wallet recovery for regulatory scenarios.
slides.item4_body: Automated coupon distribution, dividend processing, redemption at maturity, and management fee collection.
slides.item5_body: Deploy to Besu, Ethereum, Polygon, Avalanche, or any EVM chain from a single interface.
slides.item6_body: Metrics (VictoriaMetrics), logs (Loki), traces (Tempo), pre-built Grafana dashboards, automated alerting.

slides.title: Seven Asset Types
slides.item1_body: Maturity dates, coupon schedules, redemption logic. Automated yield distribution.
slides.item2_body: Collateral ratio enforcement, reserve monitoring, AML checks on every transfer.
slides.item3_body: Institutional custody integration, interest servicing, maker-checker workflows.
slides.item4_body: Dividend distribution, on-chain governance via ERC-5805 vote delegation.
slides.item5_body: NAV-based subscriptions, management fee automation, investor count controls.
slides.item6_body: Fractional ownership, pre-mint fixed supply, rental yield, physical custody.

slides.title: Implementation Roadmap
slides.milestone1_body: Requirements, compliance framework selection, infra provisioning
slides.milestone2_body: Template selection, compliance rules, identity setup
slides.milestone3_body: Integration testing, compliance validation, security audit
slides.milestone4_body: Production deploy, investor onboarding, monitoring setup

slides.title: Compliance Architecture
slides.layer1_body: Transfer restrictions, investor eligibility, jurisdiction rules, holding limits, supply caps
slides.layer2_body: OnchainID claims, KYC/AML verification, trusted issuer registry, reusable attestations
slides.layer3_body: Maker-checker workflows, RBAC/ABAC, multi-signature approvals, role-based permissions
slides.layer4_body: On-chain audit trail, regulatory report templates, real-time compliance dashboard

slides.title: Deployment Options
slides.step1_body: Fully managed on SettleMint infrastructure with multi-region HA
slides.step2_body: Sensitive data on-premises, platform services in the cloud
slides.step3_body: Kubernetes-native deployment within your own infrastructure

slides.title: Why SettleMint
slides.stat1_body: Not consulting. Configure and operate your own digital asset programs.
slides.stat2_body: Start with bonds, expand to deposits, stablecoins, equity without re-platforming.
slides.stat3_body: From contract signature to live token issuance with compliance built in.
slides.stat4_body: MiCA, MAS, VARA, SEC, FCA coverage with pre-built compliance rule packs.
